caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a t-shirt with the text "I ON NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" printed on it. The setting appears to be a casual, possibly retail environment, as evidenced by the clothing racks and mannequins in the background. The walls are adorned with framed photographs, adding a personal touch to the space. The man seems engaged in conversation, suggesting an interactive and informal discussion. The overall atmosphere is relaxed and conversational, typical of a podcast recording session.
